queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account functions as a protective factor within the determinants of default and overall credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the credit amount requested by the applicant acts as a significant credit risk driver that elevates default probability.
Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months contributes to increased default probability and long-term financial instability.
